Off Calendar May-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Shen Bao Huang's motion for an order requiring plaintiff to provide contact information for court reporter of his deposition is denied as moot and both sides' requests for CCP 128.5 monetary sanctions are denied. Mr. Huang had been provided with the information he sought to receive by his motion prior to his filing the motion, so that part of the motion is moot. While both sides engaged in behavior that falls below what is expected from cooperative and civil attorneys, neither side acted in a way that can fairly be characterized as in bad faith, frivolous or solely for the purpose of causing difficulty or delay. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk
